case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP. VS. RICHARD MCDONALD et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, DAVID C. KING TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: NOVEMBER 11, 2002 @ 10:00 AM
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-23-2002. AUG-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DAVID CHRISTOPHE KING APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-23-2002 THROUGH DEC-22-2002.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-21-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP. ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT MCDONALD, RICHARD
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
